text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Due to construction at Nakayama Racecourse,
this year's Satsuki Sho will be held in Tokyo, like
the Japanese Derby.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
The first Classic race, the Satsuki Sho, is about to
begin here in Tokyo...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno's apparently been training super hard.
She's probably in her best condition right now.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Inhale... exhale...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, it's no good. I tried to convince myself not
to be nervous, but it's not working.
choice_data_list: It's natural to be nervous about racing a rival.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: I guess you're right. Phew...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: I want to win. I don't want to lose to my rival.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I want to win. That's why I've been pushing myself
so hard.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I want to win! So I can get closer to my dream
than anyone else!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: I will! Be back soon!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
(The racecourse is totally packed. The crowd's
crammed in like sardines.)

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
This is a Classic race—a race that you can only
ever compete in once...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I haven't started running yet, but my body
already feels hot.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Chiyono O.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Yaeno...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
You were always running ahead of me on the
racer's path, your eyes burning with intensity.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
That's why I dedicated myself to training,
determined to best what I saw in you.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I worked toward this once-in-a-lifetime stage,
concentrating down my every desire and dream,
all so I could overcome the hill before me.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I have honed myself to a perfect edge. And now, I
will repay the gratitude I owe my master.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Even so, I won't let you have this—no matter how
tough you might be.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
And if you consider me a rival... If you're going to
try and take my precious goals from me...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Then I'll defeat you today, right here, right now.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: I'm sure our battle will be over in an instant...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Yes. Our rivalry will be settled here, at the one
and only Satsuki Sho we'll ever be able to run.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: And because of that...

text_block_list.name: Chiyono O & Yaeno
text_block_list.text: I won't lose to you!
